improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your AI-powered trade and business assistant. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your operations. Try three free searches today."><meta property="og:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace for business owners and traders. Start with three free searches."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:site_name" content="GDN AI"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.png"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="Gideon – AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Professional AI support for trade and business. Try three free searches.">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating value. Open Graph tags ensure professional previews when the page is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, and other platforms—critical for B2B audiences. Including the free trial offer in descriptions creates a low-friction entry point that encourages clicks.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Meet Gideon — get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support for your business operations. Try 3 free searches today."
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately communicates what Gideon is (AI assistant) and who it's for (trade and business professionals). The subheading reinforces key value props (instant answers, voice chat, professional support) while creating a clear, low-friction call to action with the free trial offer. The copy is concise, avoids hype, and builds trust by being direct about the product's purpose.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to choose a membership plan that suits your needs. Plans start from just US$2 per day, billed monthly or annually—with annual billing saving you 30 percent. As a member, you unlock unlimited access to Gideon's workspace, voice chat, and professional trade and business support.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the primary conversion point where free users hit the paywall. By clearly explaining what happens next and immediately reinforcing the accessible pricing and member benefits, it reduces friction and anxiety at the critical decision moment, guiding prospects toward conversion.
